summary:
**Business Behavior**
This workflow automatically generates and saves AI-powered summaries of project changes whenever updates are saved to the main branch. It runs as a scheduled background task, requiring no manual intervention. The system checks for new or modified content, processes it through an AI model, and records the results. If no meaningful changes are detected, the process stops without creating unnecessary work.

**Rules & Triggers**
- Activates only when code or documents are pushed to the main branch.
- Ignores pushes that only modify internal tracking files, preventing endless loops.
- Runs one instance at a time and does not interrupt ongoing processes.
- Uses a cloud AI service by default (OpenAI) but can be switched to a local system or custom endpoint through configuration settings.
- Requires valid API credentials to access the chosen AI service.

**Data Movement**
The workflow reads the full project history, compares it against the previous state, and feeds the differences into the AI system. The AI returns concise summaries, which are then saved into a dedicated project folder. These summaries are written back to the central repository so they remain accessible to the team. No external data leaves the configured AI environment unless explicitly set to use a cloud provider.

**Visible Outcomes**
- A continuously updated summary file is maintained in the project repository.
- Team members can view recent changes through these auto-generated overviews without reading raw code or documents.
- The repository automatically records a commit message whenever summaries are refreshed, providing a clear audit trail.
- If no changes warrant a new summary, the system remains silent and leaves existing records intact.
raw_code_snapshot:
name: DiffDoc Summaries

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
    paths-ignore:
      - ".diffdoc/manifest.json"
      - ".diffdoc/summaries/**"
      - ".diffdoc/vectra/**"

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: diffdoc-summarize-main
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  summarize:
    name: Update DiffDoc manifest
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    env:
      AI_PROVIDER: ${{ vars.AI_PROVIDER || secrets.AI_PROVIDER || 'local' }}
      DIFFDOC_BASE_DIR: ${{ vars.DIFFDOC_BASE_DIR || secrets.DIFFDOC_BASE_DIR || './.diffdoc' }}
      LOCAL_LLM_ENDPOINT: ${{ vars.LOCAL_LLM_ENDPOINT || secrets.LOCAL_LLM_ENDPOINT }}
      LOCAL_CHAT_MODEL: ${{ vars.LOCAL_CHAT_MODEL || secrets.LOCAL_CHAT_MODEL }}
      LOCAL_EMBED_ENDPOINT: ${{ vars.LOCAL_EMBED_ENDPOINT || secrets.LOCAL_EMBED_ENDPOINT }}
      LOCAL_EMBED_MODEL: ${{ vars.LOCAL_EMBED_MODEL || secrets.LOCAL_EMBED_MODEL }}
      CLOUD_LLM_ENDPOINT: ${{ vars.CLOUD_LLM_ENDPOINT || secrets.CLOUD_LLM_ENDPOINT || 'https://api.openai.com/v1' }}
      CLOUD_CHAT_MODEL: ${{ vars.CLOUD_CHAT_MODEL || secrets.CLOUD_CHAT_MODEL || 'gpt-4o-mini' }}
      CLOUD_EMBED_MODEL: ${{ vars.CLOUD_EMBED_MODEL || secrets.CLOUD_EMBED_MODEL || 'text-embedding-3-small' }}
      OPENAI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 22
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build DiffDoc
        run: npm run build

      - name: Update summary manifest
        run: node dist/index.js summarize --path . --mode delta

      - name: Commit manifest changes
        run: |
          if [ -z "$(git status --porcelain -- .diffdoc/manifest.json .diffdoc/summaries)" ]; then
            echo "No DiffDoc artifact changes to commit."
            exit 0
          fi

          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add .diffdoc/manifest.json .diffdoc/summaries
          git commit -m "Update DiffDoc summaries"
          git push
